title: calliopsis tinctoria
intro: Calliopsis tinctoria, also known as the Mexican Gold poppy, is a flowering plant native to North America. It is known for its bright yellow and orange flowers, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin conditions, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits of promoting tissue repair and reducing inflammation. Calliopsis tinctoria can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves for topical use, making it a versatile medicinal plant.
